name: Aleatica, S.A.B. de C.V.
summary: Aleatica, S.A.B. de C.V., together with its subsidiaries, builds, designs, operates, manages, and constructs road infrastructure projects, airports, and ports in Mexico. It operates seven toll roads and one airport. The company also provides professional, technical, and administrative services. The company was formerly known as OHL M√É¬©xico, S. A. B. de C. V. The company was incorporated in 2005 and is based in Mexico City, Mexico. Aleatica, S.A.B. de C.V. is a subsidiary of Magenta Infraestructura, S.L.U.
